## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.3

### 📷 Camera Entities
- Creates camera entities from both station records and device records so ADDX-reported cameras do not disappear when the camera is returned outside the station list.
- Fixes device-backed entity lookup by preserving the parent station identifier passed into X-Sense entities.
- Avoids duplicate camera entities when the same camera appears in both station and device data.

### 🔔 Camera AI Notifications
- Creates the AI Detection event entity for X-Sense camera entities even when the AI support flag is absent or false, allowing the notification blueprint to select the camera event entity.
- Loosens the blueprint entity selector to show X-Sense event entities without relying on Home Assistant's device-class filtering.

### 🛠️ Diagnostics and Reliability
- Adds safer diagnostics for API/session state, MQTT subscription counts, and local communication evidence without exposing tokens.
- Handles partial coordinator data during platform setup and diagnostics export.
